The '''S-1 FireHawke Heavy Repulsortank''' was a tank design used extensively by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]]. It had armament similar to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]].

==Description==
The tank's primary weapon was a turret-mounted heavy [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] with a maximum range of five kilometers. This was backed up by a medium [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] with a maximum range of one kilometer. It had a crew of five and enough room for at least one passenger.<ref name="Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal">''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal]]''</ref>

==History==
The [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Hell's Hammers]] used this repulsortank in their elite armor unit as well as having its image as part of their unit insignia.

The Firehawke was eventually replaced by the [[Imperial-class 1-H repulsortank/Legends|Imperial Repulsortank 1-H]] approximately two years after the Hammers suffered a major defeat by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on [[Turak IV]].
